    <h2>{`Front end`}</h2>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Eclipse Theia is our front-end. It is an IDE inside the browser.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`We have added plugins to Eclipse Theia that appear as new `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`F1`}</inlineCode>{` shortcuts (the same as `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`F1`}</inlineCode>{` in VSCode.)`}</li>

      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`spm-ui-upgrade-helper.bat`}</inlineCode>{`/`}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`spm-ui-upgrade-helper.sh`}</inlineCode>{` will map local folders to the Docker container thus allowing it access to the customer code.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`dev.bat`}</inlineCode>{`/`}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`dev.sh`}</inlineCode>{` will map code to the Docker container allowing you to edit and test code on the fly.`}</li>

      <li parentName="ul">{`Running this tool does the following:`}

            <ul parentName="li">
              <li parentName="ul">{`Creates an empty git repo in the output folder`}</li>
              <li parentName="ul">{`Copies potential target files to the output folder`}</li>
              <li parentName="ul">{`Commits the copied files so that we can use Git to diff them if they change`}</li>

          <li parentName="ul">{`The “Source Control: Git” tab in Eclipse Theia shows the diff of the changes`}</li>
